bio: Full-stack developer with 10 years of experience building web applications at scale. I work primarily with React, TypeScript, and Node.js — focused on shipping performant interfaces backed by solid architecture.

Currently at Supermetrics in the Netherlands, building and maintaining product features across the stack. Before that, I led MEAN stack projects, optimized page loads by 75% with Redis caching, and mentored developers across multiple teams.
Outside of work, I play badminton, tinker with my home server setup, and go through an unreasonable amount of shows and movies.
